features: 12 JavaScript coding challenges across Coding, Math, and Science subjects
Challenge editor with run tests, reset, hints, submission, points, and timer
Trivia Rush with category selection and timed questions
Logic Lock puzzle bank with daily seeded puzzle ordering
Live simulated leaderboard with point awards
Responsive hero, game cards, account form, and mobile navigation
Animated particles, cursor trail, countdown, reveal transitions, and confetti

latestChanges.description: Expanded Code Sprint from 4 to 12 daily coding challenges, adding Math and Science subject prompts alongside Coding challenges.
Updated Code Sprint copy to mention math, science, and coding challenge subjects.
Adjusted the hero scroll cue so its icon and label align together and sit slightly left of center.
